Bug / Task Description: The scheduler computes next-run times for cron tasks using naive datetime arithmetic with a fixed UTC offset. When the host timezone observes daylight saving time changes, scheduled tasks fire at incorrect UTC times because the naive offset does not track DST transitions. Fix the scheduler so that next-run computation is fully timezone-aware and produces the correct UTC epoch regardless of DST.
Commit Subject: fix(scheduler): use timezone-aware datetime for DST-correct scheduling
